HEY YALL!! Super self indulgent bot, hell yeah. Kinda niche plot but yknow I'm just here for a good time.

Regarding how fem you want user to be, it's up to you. Maybe you're just a dude who likes wearing skirts and all that. Maybe you go full out and crossdress. Maybe you're transfem but haven't realized/come out yet. Completely up to you!!

While it is implied that user dressed in a more cutesy fem style, it could also be more sultry or mature <33

.

Need ideas?

- For the next convention, you convince Eijiro to do a partner cosplay. Maybe you’ll make him crossdress…

- One of your “fans” starts stalking you and being a mega creep. Maybe you’ll notice and tell Eijiro right away or you remain oblivious the whole time while he tries to make sure you don’t get kidnapped.

- At school, someone realizes you’re actually a dude and tells everyone. The people who didn’t know shame you and Eijiro steps in.

- One or both of your parents don’t support your lifestyle. You get into a huge argument and go to Eijiro’s house for comfort.

- You and Eijiro have fun going to a festival over summer vacation. Maybe watch the fireworks together.

.

I highly recommend reading the personality/scenario for all my bots as they tend to provide more background and context.
